title: adj./adv. + enough + to V

formulas.zh: 形容詞／副詞 + enough + (給某人) + 不定詞，表示足夠……可以做某事

formulas.formula: so + adj./adv. + that + S + can + V
formulas.zh: 此句型可改寫為 so...that 結構，表達相同意思

explanation: 此句型用於表達某事物或某人具有足夠的程度、能力或條件，足以完成某項動作。enough 必須置於形容詞或副詞之後，不可前置。若加入 for sb. 則表示「對某人來說足夠」。此結構常見於日常生活與學術文脈，可與 so...that 互換使用。學習者需注意 enough 位置的正確性，避免常見的前置錯誤。

examples.eng: The road is wide enough for two cars to pass each other safely.
examples.chi: 這條路足夠寬，可以讓兩輛車安全地相互通過。

examples.eng: He spoke clearly enough for everyone in the back to hear him.
examples.chi: 他說得足夠清楚，使得後排的每個人都能聽到他。

examples.eng: This laptop is fast enough to handle complex graphic design tasks.
examples.chi: 這台筆記型電腦足夠快，可以處理複雜的平面設計工作。

examples.eng: The students were mature enough to understand the serious implications.
examples.chi: 這些學生足夠成熟，能夠理解其中的嚴重含義。

extension.tip: 判斷 enough 是否需要加 for sb.：若句子已有明確的行為者，可省略 for sb.；若需表達「對誰來說足夠」，則加入 for sb.。注意 enough 必須跟在形容詞／副詞後，不可寫成 enough + adj.，此為最常見的錯誤。

examples.test: ❌ enough cold (錯誤) vs. ✓ cold enough (正確)
examples.result: → enough 位置必須在形容詞之後，cold enough 才正確

examples.test: ✓ large enough to hold 10 people (完整) vs. ✓ large enough (簡潔)
examples.result: → 視上下文，with to V 可選，但通常加入會更明確表達目的

examples.test: ✓ He runs fast enough to win the race. vs. ✓ He is fast enough to win the race.
examples.result: → 副詞修飾動詞，形容詞修飾主詞，兩者都正確但結構不同

extension.note: 記住「形容詞、副詞 + enough」的順序，enough 永不前置；若有 for sb.，置於 enough 之後。

exercises.sentence: The explanation was simple enough for the children to understand it.
exercises.translation: 這個解釋足夠簡單，使得孩子們能夠理解它。

parts: to earn a scholarship to the top university.
exercises.sentence: She worked hard enough for herself to earn a scholarship to the top university.
exercises.translation: 她足夠努力，為自己獲得了頂尖大學的獎學金。

exercises.sentence: The bridge is strong enough for heavy trucks to cross safely.
exercises.translation: 這座橋足夠堅固，可以讓重型卡車安全通過。

parts: the audience to follow every word.
exercises.sentence: The speaker spoke slowly enough for the audience to follow every word.
exercises.translation: 演講者說得足夠慢，使得觀眾能夠跟上每一個詞。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確填空，完成關於足夠能力的英文句子。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The box is _______ for one person to carry alone.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。enough 必須置於形容詞之後，形成「adj. + enough」結構。B 選項 enough light 詞序錯誤；C 選項 light so 不符合任何英文句型；D 選項 so light 後需接 that 子句，此處無法使用。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填空使句子表達「對某人來說足夠的能力」之意。
mc_exercises.question_eng: She runs fast _______ for her teammates to keep up with her.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。adv. + enough 用於表示「足夠地...使得」，符合「跑得夠快以至於隊友能跟上」的邏輯。A 選項搭配錯誤；C 選項 very enough 不適當（enough 不與 very 搭配）；D 選項 too 表相反含義。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇合適詞彙，完成關於充分條件的句子。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The apartment is spacious _______ for a family of five to live comfortably.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。「adj. + enough + for sb. + to V」是標準句型，表示「足夠寬敞讓五口家庭舒適生活」。B 選項 that enough 順序錯誤；C 選項 enough that 後需完整子句；D 選項 so that 需要 so adj./adv. that 的完整形式。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 進階題：選擇正確選項，完成複雜的充分條件句。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The young pianist played brilliantly _______ that even the most critical judges were impressed by his technical mastery.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。此句需要「so + adv. + that + S + can/V」結構，表「演奏得如此精彩以至於...」。A 選項 enough 後無 that 子句不適當；C 選項 enough so 搭配錯誤；D 選項 very so 不符合英文句法。此題測試 so...that 與 enough...to 的區別。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這個盒子足夠輕，小孩可以拿起來。
translation_exercises.answer: The box is light enough for a child to pick up.
hints: 句型框架：adj. + enough + for sb. + to V
注意：enough 必須放在形容詞後面，不能寫成 enough light

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 你說話的速度足夠慢，讓我能理解。
translation_exercises.answer: You speak slowly enough for me to understand.
hints: 句型框架：adv. + enough + for sb. + to V；副詞 enough 也要放在副詞後面
常見錯誤：誤寫成 'enough slowly' 或 'speak enough slowly'

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這部電影夠有趣，足以讓全班學生在週末時間觀看。
translation_exercises.answer: The movie is interesting enough for all the students in the class to watch during the weekend.
key_points: for all the students in the class
hints: 句型框架：adj. + enough + for + 複雜受詞 + to V
注意：for 後面可以接複雜的名詞片語，整個結構仍需保持完整

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他的英文程度已經足夠好，能夠在國際會議上用英文發表研究成果，而不需要翻譯的協助。
translation_exercises.answer: His English proficiency is good enough for him to present his research findings in English at an international conference without the help of a translator.
hints: 句型框架：adj. + enough + for sb. + to V；可搭配複雜的動詞片語或副詞片語增加句子複雜度
常見錯誤：在複雜句式中忽略 for sb. 這個關鍵成分，或誤將 enough 前置
